---
title: "Vatnafræði lokaverkefni"
author: "Árni"
date: "2026-04-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library("tidyverse")
library("forcats")
library("ggplot2")
library("dplyr")
```
Lesum inn gögnin
```{r}
dat <- read.csv("C:/Users/olafs/Downloads/lamah_ice/lamah_ice/D_gauges/2_timeseries/daily/ID_67.csv", sep = ";")
```
Filterum út þau gögn sem við viljum ekki. Viljum bara hafa frá 1.10.1993 til 30.9.2023 og setjum á staðlað dagsetningaform.


```{r}
dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(paste(YYYY, MM, DD, sep = "-")))

dat_30ar <- dat %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("1993-10-01"),
         date <= as.Date("2023-09-30"))
```


3. Mat á grunnvatnsframlagi

Metum grunnvatnsframlag vatnasviðsins árið 2020
```{r}
dat_20 <- dat %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2020-01-01"),
         date <= as.Date("2020-12-31"))
```

```{r}
# Skilgreinum fastann fyrir Ladson aðferðina
alpha <- 0.925

dat_20$qf <- 0 #yfirborðsrennsli (quikflow)
dat_20$qb <- 0 #grunnrennsli (baseflow)

# Förum í gegnum gögnin dag fyrir dag
for (i in 2:nrow(dat_20)) {
  
  # Rennsli í dag og í gær
  q_dag <- dat_20$qobs[i]
  q_gaer <- dat_20$qobs[i - 1]
  
  # Quickflow frá deginum áður
  qf_fyrri <- dat_20$qf[i - 1]
  
  # Ladson aðferðin
  qf_nytt <- alpha * qf_fyrri + ((1 + alpha) / 2) * (q_dag - q_gaer)
  
  # Quickflow má ekki vera neikvætt
  if (qf_nytt < 0) {
    qf_nytt <- 0
  }
  
  # Quickflow má ekki vera stærra en heildarrennslið
  if (qf_nytt > q_dag) {
    qf_nytt <- q_dag
  }
  
  # Baseflow er afgangurinn af heildarrennslinu
  qb_nytt <- q_dag - qf_nytt
  
  dat_20$qf[i] <- qf_nytt
  dat_20$qb[i] <- qb_nytt
}

#Reiknum baseflow inded (BFI)
heildar_rennsli <- sum(dat_20$qobs) /365
heildar_baseflow <- sum(dat_20$qb) /365
BFI <- heildar_baseflow / heildar_rennsli

cat("Heildarrennsli yfir tímabilið:", round(heildar_rennsli, 3), "\n")
cat("Heildargrunnrennsli yfir tímabilið:", round(heildar_baseflow, 3), "\n")
cat("Baseflow Index (BFI):", round(BFI, 3), "\n")

#Setjum upp graf
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(dat_20, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_area(aes(y = qb), fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(aes(y = qobs), color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  labs(
    title = "Heildarrennsli og áætlað grunnrennsli",
    x = "",
    y = "Rennsli (m3/S)") + theme_minimal()
```



Rýrnunarstuðull

Finnum tímabil sem sýna lækkun í rennsli yfir sumartíma
```{r}
# Fyrsta tímabil
rec_1 <- subset(dat_30ar, date >= as.Date("1998-06-03") & date <= as.Date("1998-06-14"))
rec_1$t <- 0:(nrow(rec_1) - 1)
fit_1 <- lm(log(qobs) ~ t, data = rec_1)
k_1 <- -1 / coef(fit_1)[2]

# Annað tímabil
rec_2 <- subset(dat_30ar, date >= as.Date("2013-06-10") & date <= as.Date("2013-06-25"))
rec_2$t <- 0:(nrow(rec_2) - 1)
fit_2 <- lm(log(qobs) ~ t, data = rec_2)
k_2 <- -1 / coef(fit_2)[2]

# Þriðja tímabil
rec_3 <- subset(dat_30ar, date >= as.Date("2019-05-22") & date <= as.Date("2019-06-09"))
rec_3$t <- 0:(nrow(rec_3) - 1)
fit_3 <- lm(log(qobs) ~ t, data = rec_3)
k_3 <- -1 / coef(fit_3)[2]

# Meðaltal
medal_k <- mean(c(k_1, k_2, k_3))

cat("k_1 =", round(k_1, 2), "dagar\n")
cat("k_2 =", round(k_2, 2), "dagar\n")
cat("k_3 =", round(k_3, 2), "dagar\n")
cat("Meðal-k =", round(medal_k, 2), "dagar\n")
```
Liður 5
```{r}
# Tökum rennslisgildin
Q <- dat_30ar$qobs

# Röðum frá hæsta til lægsta
Q_sorted <- sort(Q, decreasing = TRUE)

# Fjöldi mælinga
n <- length(Q_sorted)

# Exceedance probability (%)
p_exceed <- 100 * (1:n) / (n + 1)

# Finna Q5, Q50 og Q95
Q5  <- quantile(Q, probs = 0.95)
Q50 <- quantile(Q, probs = 0.50)
Q95 <- quantile(Q, probs = 0.05)

cat("Q5 =", round(Q5, 2), "\n")
cat("Q50 =", round(Q50, 2), "\n")
cat("Q95 =", round(Q95, 2), "\n")

# Teikna flow duration curve
ggplot(fdc, aes(x = p_exceed, y = Q_sorted)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Langæislína rennslis",
    x = "Prósenta tímans þegar rennsli fer yfir (%)",
    y = "Rennsli (m3/s)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
Liður 7
Leitnigreining

Bútur 1
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(trend)
library(modifiedmk)
library(ggplot2)

#Búum til dagsetningar
dat_30ar <- dat_30ar %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    year = year(date),
    month = month(date),
    
    #Skilgreinum vatnsár
    water_year = ifelse(month >= 10, year + 1, year),
    season = case_when(
      month %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Vetur",
      month %in% c(3, 4, 5) ~ "Vor",
      month %in% c(6, 7, 8) ~ "Sumar",
      month %in% c(9, 10, 11) ~ "Haust"
    ),
    season_year = ifelse(month == 12, year + 1, year)
  )
```

Bútur 2
```{r}

#Árlegt meðalrennsli
annual_q <- dat_30ar %>%
  group_by(water_year) %>%
  summarise(Q_mean = mean(qobs, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

#Árstíð meðalrennsli
seasonal_q <- dat_30ar %>%
  group_by(season_year, season) %>%
  summarise(Q_mean = mean(qobs, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

#Búa til töflu
trend_results <- data.frame(
  timabil = c("Árlegt", "Vetur", "Vor", "Sumar", "Haust"),
  sen_slope = c(
    as.numeric(sens.slope(annual_q$Q_mean)$estimates),
    as.numeric(sens.slope(seasonal_q$Q_mean[seasonal_q$season == "Vetur"])$estimates),
    as.numeric(sens.slope(seasonal_q$Q_mean[seasonal_q$season == "Vor"])$estimates),
    as.numeric(sens.slope(seasonal_q$Q_mean[seasonal_q$season == "Sumar"])$estimates),
    as.numeric(sens.slope(seasonal_q$Q_mean[seasonal_q$season == "Haust"])$estimates)
  ),
  p_value = c(
    as.numeric(mmkh(annual_q$Q_mean)["new P-value"]),
    as.numeric(mmkh(seasonal_q$Q_mean[seasonal_q$season == "Vetur"])["new P-value"]),
    as.numeric(mmkh(seasonal_q$Q_mean[seasonal_q$season == "Vor"])["new P-value"]),
    as.numeric(mmkh(seasonal_q$Q_mean[seasonal_q$season == "Sumar"])["new P-value"]),
    as.numeric(mmkh(seasonal_q$Q_mean[seasonal_q$season == "Haust"])["new P-value"])
  )
)

#Skilgreina hvenær marktækt og hvenær ekki
trend_results$leitni <- ifelse(
  trend_results$p_value < 0.05 & trend_results$sen_slope > 0,
  "Marktæk aukning",
  ifelse(
    trend_results$p_value < 0.05 & trend_results$sen_slope < 0,
    "Marktæk minnkun",
    "Engin marktæk leitni"
  )
)

#Skila niðurstöðum
trend_results
```

Bútur 3
```{r}
ggplot(annual_q, aes(x = water_year, y = Q_mean)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Árlegt meðalrennsli eftir vatnaári",
    x = "Vatnaár",
    y = "Meðalrennsli (m3/s)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(seasonal_q, aes(x = season_year, y = Q_mean)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~season, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Árstíðabundið meðalrennsli",
    x = "Ár",
    y = "Meðalrennsli (m3/s)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
